content.en:
As one by one of the golden dragon stones was consumed, Ye Tian finally completed the first life reforge, his body became a little stronger, and even his immeasurable will increased.

Ye Tian tested it and found that his immeasurable will had increased to 380 scales.

"Before, my immeasurable will was about 360 scales, so it was difficult to continue to increase, but now after completing a life reforge, it will directly increase by 20 scales, in this way, when nine life recasts are completed, the immeasurable will will definitely reach 500 scales, reaching the standard of impacting high-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Before, when he hadn't conducted the life reforge experiment, he still felt that it was almost impossible for a mid-level immeasurable lifeform to raise the immeasurable will to 500 scales.

Later, I learned that life reforge can improve the immeasurable will, so it is possible to raise the immeasurable will to 500 scale, but even if the average mid-level immeasurable life form completes nine life reforges, it may still not reach the 500 scale, and it needs the assistance of many precious treasures to raise the immeasurable will to the standard of 500.

After completing the first life reforge, Ye Tian tested his combat power and found that the amplification effect was better than the effect of using Silver Dragon Gold before.

"It's worthy of the Iso-Golden Sands formula, the increase in each life reforge is higher, and the tenth reforge can be carried out in the future, no wonder even forces like the Remnant Heaven Pavilion are extremely eager to obtain the Iso-Golden Sands!"

Ye Tian knew that if he revealed the secret that he possessed a large number of different golden sands, he was afraid that he would be besieged by countless high-level immeasurable lifeforms the next day.

Of course, as long as he himself does not reveal it, no one knows the secret.

In the following years, Ye Tian refined a large number of golden dragon stones, constantly recasting his life level.

Although it is more and more difficult to reforge the life level after the first life, at least the first few times it is still easy.

After a period of time, Ye Tian directly completed five life reforges.

From the sixth life reforge, the resources and time spent are very long, but each life reforged will increase the strength a little more.

After the first year of the Ten Thousand Realms, Ye Tian finally completed the sixth life recasting with the help of hundreds of golden dragon stones.

This time the life reforge made Ye Tian's strength skyrocket directly, and the range of life transformation was too great.

"I didn't expect that the sixth life reforge would increase my strength so much!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

He felt that his current strength should hopefully be comparable to that of ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Of course, it refers to a high-level immeasurable life form that has not comprehended the Infinite Extreme Dao, and the immeasurable body is not a superior immeasurable body, otherwise he will not be able to defeat it.

After all, the gap between a middle-level immeasurable life form and a high-level immeasurable life form is too big!

"This time, I will first draw out that high-level immeasurable lifeform, otherwise it would not be comfortable to have a high-level immeasurable lifeform staring at me all the time. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This is also the strength of that high-level immeasurable lifeform is not very strong, he feels that he can handle it, otherwise he would not do it.

So on this day, Ye Tian's replica body left the Hurricane Capital.

......

"That Xuanming Great Ancestor has finally left the Hurricane Capital!"

The Great Ancestor of the Ape and Leopard immediately chased after him.

If he can get a large amount of different golden sand from Ye Tian, then he has made a great achievement!

It's unlikely, but he's willing to try.

After all, at his level, it would be too difficult to progress further, and he thought that his potential was average, and his status in the Remnant Heaven Pavilion was just like that.

Therefore, he had to strive for greater merit in order to obtain greater cultivation in the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

Otherwise, he would have relied on his own slow penance, and he would not have thought of progress for countless years.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to a void in the Hurricane Collar and waited for the arrival of the Ape Leopard Great Ancestor, but after the Ape and Leopard Great Ancestor came, he did not show up, he still wanted to hide and follow Ye Tian to see if he could find the Strange Golden Sands Treasure Land.

"Come out, Ape Leopard Ancestor!"

Ye Tian called the title of Ape Leopard Great Ancestor.

The Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard only knew that he had been exposed at this time, and he only thought that Ye Tian was good at perception and had a special method of perception, so that he could see through his whereabouts.

Airplanes!

The Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard walked out of the void and said, "I didn't expect you to not only know that there are high-level immeasurable lifeforms to follow, but also know my identity!"

"Ape Leopard Ancestor, what are you following me for?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's nothing, I'm just curious about where you got your foreign golden sands, say it, otherwise you won't be able to leave today!"

The Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard showed a cruel smile, he didn't believe that Ye Tian could escape from him.

As long as Ye Tian couldn't escape, then no one would know about this matter, and it wouldn't affect the credibility of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

"Just you?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Seeing Ye Tian mocking himself, the Great Ancestor of the Ape and Leopard was extremely angry and immediately took action.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying aura permeated from the body of the Great Ancestor of the Ape and Leopard, and the body of the Ape Saint also completely exploded.

The body of the ape saint is the body of the inferior immeasurable, and now it has also been cultivated to the realm of Xiaocheng by the great ancestor of the ape and leopard.

But other than that, the Great Ancestor of the Ape and Leopard is nothing special, the Infinite Dao is only at the limit realm, and the Infinite Will is only a thousand scales, which can be regarded as average.

"Ape Strike!"

The Great Ancestor of the Ape and Leopard held a long stick and struck it fiercely, carrying terrifying power.

Even the top-notch mid-level immeasurable lifeforms would be directly blasted by this blow and turned into nothingness.

Of course.

The Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard didn't want to kill Ye Tian, after all, he hadn't gotten the news of the Yi Jinsha yet, so he stopped and was only ready to severely damage Ye Tian.

However.

Ye Tian urged the Infinite Extreme Body, and the power of the Infinite Extreme Dao appeared on his body, and he shook the blow of the Ape Leopard Great Ancestor with one hand, and his body was majestic and immovable.

"Just a high-level immeasurable lifeform, that's it?"

Ye Tian mocked again.

"It's impossible to !!"

The Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard was shocked.

He didn't expect Ye Tian to actually cultivate into a superior immeasurable body, and he had also cultivated to the Xiaocheng realm, which was not too far from the Dacheng realm.

Moreover, Ye Tian also comprehended the Infinite Extreme Dao and mastered the Infinite Extreme Dao control technique.

In addition, Ye Tian's foundation is too terrifying, it seems that it is only six life reforges, but it is even more terrifying than the foundation of nine life reforges.

Is this kind of strength still a mid-level immeasurable lifeform?

Thundered!!!!

The Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard and Ye Tian kept fighting, but they were suppressed again and again.

If the Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard knew that Ye Tian's copy body was just a copy body with low combat power, and it was not as terrifying as its body, it would definitely be dumbfounded.

"Endless Golden Spear!"

Ye Tian burst out with all his combat power, and a little golden mangs tore through many of the ape and leopard ancestor's defenses, and a single blow pierced through his body.

However, after all, the Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard was a high-level immeasurable life form, and this injury was nothing.

But the Great Ancestor of the Ape Leopard knew that he was not Ye Tian's opponent, so without saying a word, he fled directly.

Ye Tian didn't chase and kill, he didn't have the strength to kill a high-level immeasurable lifeform now!
